# Performance Budgets and Lighthouse Evidence

This document defines baseline performance budgets and includes the latest measured Lighthouse snapshot for the shell app.

---

## Budget Targets

| Metric | Budget Target | Notes |
|-------|---------------|------|
| Lighthouse Performance Score | >= 80 | Main shell landing experience should remain in good range |
| Lighthouse Accessibility Score | >= 95 | Accessibility regressions are release blockers |
| Lighthouse Best Practices Score | >= 95 | Security and platform hygiene guardrail |
| First Contentful Paint (FCP) | <= 1800 ms | Perceived initial render speed |
| Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) | <= 2500 ms | Main content readiness |
| Total Blocking Time (TBT) | <= 200 ms | Interactivity and main-thread stability |
| Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) | <= 0.10 | Visual stability target |
| Speed Index | <= 3400 ms | Above-the-fold visual completeness |

---

## Latest Measured Snapshot

Committed measurement artifact: `docs/reports/lighthouse-shell-home-summary.json`
Local optional full artifact (not committed): `docs/reports/lighthouse-shell-home.json`

| Metric | Measured Value | Budget | Status |
|-------|----------------|--------|--------|
| Performance Score | 45 | >= 80 | FAIL |
| Accessibility Score | 96 | >= 95 | PASS |
| Best Practices Score | 96 | >= 95 | PASS |
| FCP | 862 ms | <= 1800 ms | PASS |
| LCP | 7265 ms | <= 2500 ms | FAIL |
| TBT | 3100 ms | <= 200 ms | FAIL |
| CLS | 0.000 | <= 0.10 | PASS |
| Speed Index | 3766 ms | <= 3400 ms | FAIL |

Snapshot context:

1. Target: `http://localhost:4200`
2. Runtime: shell development server with mock auth and mock data
3. Timestamp: `2026-04-28T04:20:46.4118560Z`

---

## Immediate Optimization Focus

1. Reduce shell startup JS by deferring non-critical bundles and code paths.
2. Eliminate avoidable synchronous work during first route paint.
3. Prioritize LCP element rendering and avoid long-running startup tasks.
4. Keep remote loading lazy and route-triggered only.
5. Track build output growth in CI and fail on sustained regressions.

---

## Repro Command

1. Start shell at `http://localhost:4200`.
2. Start headless Chrome with remote debugging on port `9222`.
3. Run Lighthouse:

```powershell
npx --yes lighthouse http://localhost:4200 --port=9222 '--only-categories=performance,accessibility,best-practices' --output=json --output-path=docs/reports/lighthouse-shell-home.json --quiet --no-enable-error-reporting
```

Then capture only the compact fields into `docs/reports/lighthouse-shell-home-summary.json` for review commits.
